mapper.select: SELECT * FROM artifact_images WHERE artifact_id = #{artifactId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO artifact_images (artifact_id, image_url, image_path, is_primary, sort_order) VALUES (#{artifactId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imagePath}, #{isPrimary}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE artifact_images SET is_primary = 0 WHERE artifact_id = #{artifactId}
UPDATE artifact_images SET is_primary = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
